query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS field_data (
  id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY,
  user_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES users(id),
  parcel_number VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  location_lat DECIMAL(10, 8),
  location_lng DECIMAL(11, 8),
  area VARCHAR(255),
  boundaries TEXT,
  notes TEXT,
  photos TEXT[],
  timestamp TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  synced_at TIMESTAMP,
  created_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_field_data_user_id ON field_data(user_id);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_field_data_parcel_number ON field_data(parcel_number);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_field_data_timestamp ON field_data(timestamp);
